ddls:
CREATE TABLE "articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "content" TEXT /* The full text content of the article */,
  "article_length" INTEGER /* The length of the article */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* The URL of the article's original source */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* The date when the article was published */,
  "author" TEXT /* The author of the article */,
  "title" TEXT /* The title of the article */,
  "category" TEXT /* The category of the article (e.g., politics, sports) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "labels" (
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each label */,
  "label_name" TEXT /* The name of the label */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the label */,
  "label_type" TEXT /* The type of label (e.g., propaganda technique, sentiment) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("label_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_labels" (
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each labeled segment */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the article containing the segment */,
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the label assigned to the segment */,
  "start" INTEGER /* The starting position of the segment within the article */,
  "end" INTEGER /* The ending position of the segment within the article */,
  "start_end" TEXT /* A string representation of the start and end positions along with the label */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* The user who assigned the label */,
  "label_confidence" REAL /* The confidence level of the label assignment (e.g., 0.8, 0.9) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_labels_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_labels_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_labels_label_id FOREIGN KEY ("label_id") REFERENCES labels ("label_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* The full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* The email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* The role of the user within the platform */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* The hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the article being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the article */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* The date when the article was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* The type of access (e.g., view, edit, analyze) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_access_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "label_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each label statistic */,
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the label */,
  "total_occurrences" INTEGER /* Total number of times the label has been used */,
  "average_frequency" REAL /* The average frequency of the label across all articles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_label_statistics_label_id FOREIGN KEY ("label_id") REFERENCES labels ("label_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the article being collaborated on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user collaborating */,
  "role" TEXT /* The role of the user in the collaboration (e.g., owner, editor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the article being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user making the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* The text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* The date when the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "replies" (
  "reply_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reply */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the comment being replied to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user making the reply */,
  "reply_text" TEXT /* The text of the reply */,
  "reply_date" TEXT /* The date when the reply was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reply_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_replies_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_replies_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the article being versioned */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* The version number of the article */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* The date when the version was created */,
  "version_text" TEXT /* The text of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_versions_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "label_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the article being labeled */,
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the label assigned */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* The date when the label was assigned */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* The user who assigned the label */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_label_history_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_label_history_label_id FOREIGN KEY ("label_id") REFERENCES labels ("label_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_label_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
